title: alter-ego plugin manifest (.alter-ego/manifest.yaml)
description: State written by alter-ego:init and read/reconciled by alter-ego:upgrade. Records what the plugin created in a repo, at what version, and which files are managed (reconciled on upgrade) vs user-owned (never touched).

manifestVersion.description: Schema version of this manifest file itself.

alterEgoVersion.description: The plugin.json `version` at the last init/upgrade. The single source of truth `upgrade` diffs against.

initialized.description: Date alter-ego:init first ran in this repo (YYYY-MM-DD).

updated.description: Date of the last init/upgrade pass (YYYY-MM-DD).

skills.description: Alter-ego skills init offered/enabled in this repo, with the plugin version that last seeded/reconciled each.

name.description: Skill directory name under skills/ (e.g. knowledge-management).

enabled.description: Whether this skill is set up in this repo.

config.description: The skill's opt-in config file, if it has one.

path.description: Config file path relative to repo root (e.g. knowledge.config.yaml).

present.description: Whether the file exists in the repo. Absent means the skill runs on defaults.

managed.description: Always false: values are user-owned. Only schema migrations touch it, review-gated.

schema.description: Path to the config's JSON schema inside the plugin (the managed side).

seededVersion.description: Plugin version that last seeded/reconciled this skill's managed artifacts. `upgrade` diffs this per-skill.

primitives.description: Shared primitives seeded up front (chiefly the knowledge vault), with per-artifact managed/version state.

root.description: Root path of the primitive relative to repo root (e.g. knowledge/).

seededVersion.description: Plugin version whose conventions this primitive was seeded with. The migrate-from target for `upgrade`.

files.description: Individual seeded files and whether upgrade may reconcile them.

path.description: File path relative to repo root.

role.description: What the file is (e.g. vault-contract, vault-index, vault-log).

managed.description: true → conventions may be reconciled on upgrade (review-gated). false → user/skill-owned content, never touched.

integrations.description: Composition with other plugins present in the repo.

present.description: true when a .the-loop/ directory exists in the repo.

registered.description: true once alter-ego skills are listed in .the-loop/external-tools.md.
